_comment: Autopilot carousel template. The agent COPIES templateDesignId, then on each page fills the EXACT element ids below (copy-design preserves ids). bg = full-bleed background image; headline/body/cta = text elements. This removes guesswork so a cheap model places photo+text in the right layers. If the template is changed, re-read its element ids via start-editing-transaction and update this map.
